author: lOrm
content: Partial resolution in commit 9c20dac. Extracted `record_turn_estimate` and `apply_vdd_review` helpers — function shrunk from 308 to ~174 lines and the four duplicate Response-reassembly sites (VDD result variants) are now a single pattern-matched helper. Resolve_provider, compact_if_needed, and transform_and_forward extractions remain as follow-ups — each would be net-neutral without a broader pipeline API.
